title: Hazen 'n Stuff
description: An Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks addon that adds in equipment and spells.
body:
![Hazen 'n Stuff title.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebe5f7c48136f0decce0a756d98637d9493f78ac.png)

[Discord.](https://discord.gg/cCXKcbMZyX)

# This mod requires:
## 1.21.1
- [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks)
- [AzureLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/azurelib)
- [Ace's Spell Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/aces-spell-utils)
- [Apothic Attributes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-attributes)
## 1.20.1
- [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks)
- [GTBC's SpellLib/API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gtbcs-spelllib)

# Note:
Not all mods are on Modrinth, I've put a link for each of these mods.


Hazen 'n Stuff in **Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks** spells and equipment addon.
The mod adds in new armor set tiers, cosmetic items, around 2 new spells books, spells and armor sets in reference to other mods or games, and more!

<details>
  <summary>Armor Sets</summary>
  
  <details>
    <summary>Pure Armor</summary>
The Pure Tier is a step above the initial Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks base school armor sets.
    
Currently, there are 9 pure tier armor sets. Each armor set is for one of the nine schools in Iron's Spells.

![Pure Tier Armor Sets from Hazen 'n Stuff.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e2fa24b82cd4e199a5bdd5ae4ba02cc8cabc163.png)

While wearing the full set, it will grant the user an armor set bonus effect.

![A player wearing a full set of a pure tier armor set and showing the set bonus that it provides.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad78d3ff14f8f458c496c3fc3e48bac2a6fe4ce6.png)

Each armor set all provide 150 Mana, 15% school spell power, 15% spell power, and 5% eldritch spell power.

![An example showing the stats for the Pure Tier armor set.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a27f5e5b6b006ef1f9fbf5517accbc8d15141172.png)

  </details>
  
  <details>
    <summary>Cosmetic Armor Sets</summary>

Some cosmetic armor sets are in reference to some parts of online media.

Some examples can be shown below.

![This is a sample of the cosmetic armor sets that are in reference to Hatsune Miku, Kasane Teto, and Neru.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9193c960f2e7ca8c3d1982b29deb90436a818144.png)

  </details>

  <details>
    <summary>Dedicated Armor Sets</summary>

In addition to the cosmetic armor sets, there are armor sets dedicated to close friends or people that I've known.

- MtheNinja
- Ace_The_Eldritch_King
- FoxeLocklear
- Amadhe
- Ill9ustratedSky
- Moth
- Catherine

![Dedicated Armor Sets.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c88219c34ec87a87d1ed243dd4164ae0c026802.png)


  </details>

</details>


<details>
  <summary>Weapons and Tools</summary>
In total, there are 37 weapons and 2 tools.

![Some weapons from Hazen 'n Stuff.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/440d5366a68bfc26ed49d0bd1eb62d4d185dd029.png)

</details>



<details>
  <summary>Staves</summary>
Currently, there are 10 staves that have been added in.

![10 Staves from Hazen 'n Stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14acf7f2212a1d4367f7a2f89620408d40c5a3d9.png)

</details>


<details>
  <summary>Spells</summary>
Hazen 'n Stuff adds in new spells along with 2 work in progress schools, Radiance and Shadow.

![Hazen 'n Stuff Spell List A.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c2eb977216fee93e23332da13b4ad96938b1285.png)

![Hazen 'n Stuff Spell List B.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49713898424b33281a2648e0158b7acbff4a00f4.png)

### Fire
- Brimstone Hellblast
- Cinderous Step

### Ice
- Ice Arrow
- Crystal Volley

### Nature
- Thorn Chakram
- Counterspell Spider Lily
- Shard Sword
- Death Sentence

### Lightning
- Energy Burst

### Evocation
- Spectral Axe

### Holy
- Golden Shower

### Eldritch
- Soul Seekers

### Shadow
- Night's Edge Slash
- Chaotic Teleport

### Radiance
- Syringe Barrage
- Shooting Star
- Stellar Collapse
- Terraprismic Barrage
- Call Forth Terraprisma

</details>



<details>
<summary>Blocks</summary>
Hazen 'n Stuff adds in a few blocks, some decorative, some being ore blocks, and some that fill in some gaps such as a full Wisewood set, expanding on the Wisewood Shelves from Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks.

![An assortment of block from Hazen 'n Stuff.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f53adb1242e2af7bb9c1760f16e8b81275f0fe2.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Compat</summary>

Hazen 'n Stuff has compat with other various mods such as:

- [Iron's Gems 'n Jewelry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/irons-jewelry)
- [Ars Nouveau](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ars-nouveau)
- [Malum](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/malum)
- [Obscuria's Tooltips](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/obscure-tooltips)
- 
- [Discerning the Eldritch](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/discerning-the-eldritch)

</details>
